description: AI Flow Strategist. Reads ETF flows + research + critique + EDGAR + crisis KB, calls Claude Sonnet 4.6 with 1h cached system prompt, generates decisive cross-feed ticker calls with conviction grades, position sizes, stop levels, signal alignment. Writes etf-flows/ai-analysis.json.
